name: alt-sendme
description: Send files and folders anywhere in the world without storing in cloud - any size, any format, no accounts, no restrictions.
readme_summary: Alt-Sendme is a free, open-source file transfer tool that enables direct peer-to-peer file and folder sharing of any size or format. It prioritizes privacy and security through end-to-end encryption and avoids cloud storage, accounts, or personal information requirements.
key_features: Send anywhere (local networks or across continents)
Transfer anything (any size, any format, verified with BLAKE3)
No accounts or personal info required
primary_use_case: Direct, secure, and private file transfer between users without relying on cloud services.
cover_image_prompt: A conceptual illustration of two people on opposite sides of a stylized globe, connected by a direct, glowing beam of light carrying a package. The beam bypasses any cloud icons or server farms. One person is handing the package, which is transparent and shows files inside, into the beam, while the other person is receiving it. Subtle digital particles and the 'AltSendme' logo are integrated into the beam. The overall mood is secure and efficient, with a clean, modern aesthetic. The style should be a 3D isometric illustration with vibrant, contrasting colors to emphasize the direct connection.

name: ODM
description: A command line toolkit to generate maps, point clouds, 3D models and DEMs from drone, balloon or kite images. 📷
readme_summary: ODM is an open-source command-line toolkit for processing aerial drone imagery. It converts 2D drone images into various geospatial products like classified point clouds, 3D textured models, orthorectified imagery, and digital elevation models.
key_features: Command-line interface for scripting and integration
Available for Windows, Mac, and Linux
primary_use_case: Processing aerial drone imagery to create detailed 2D and 3D geospatial products for applications such as mapping, surveying, and environmental monitoring.
cover_image_prompt: A skilled cartographer, depicted as a modern-day alchemist, stands in a sunlit workshop filled with antique maps and glowing digital interfaces. They are holding a drone's camera lens, from which streams of 2D aerial photographs are flowing into a large, ornate crucible. Inside the crucible, these images are magically transforming into a shimmering, detailed 3D topographic map rising from the base, with a textured 3D model of a landscape and a glowing orthophoto appearing as byproducts. Subtle lines of code and data visualizations flicker on small screens around the alchemist. The scene is rendered in a rich, detailed digital painting style with a warm, inviting color palette, emphasizing the transformation from raw data to valuable geospatial information.

name: AI-Text-Humanizer-App
description: Transform AI-generated text into formal, human-like, and academic writing with ease, avoids AI detector!
readme_summary: This Python application, built with Streamlit, transforms AI-generated or informal text into formal, human-like, and academic writing. It offers features like expanding contractions, adding academic transitions, and optional synonym replacement to help bypass AI detectors and improve text quality.
primary_use_case: To convert AI-generated text into human-like, academic writing that can bypass AI detection.
cover_image_prompt: A skilled calligrapher meticulously transforming a block of rough, digital-looking text into elegant, flowing script on parchment. The digital text is represented by glowing, geometric blocks, while the parchment shows a smooth, natural handwriting. Subtle visual cues like a quill pen emitting digital particles and a small, minimalist UI overlay showing word counts and transformation progress connect the metaphor to the software. The scene is set in a cozy, well-lit study with a warm, inviting atmosphere. The art style should be a 3D isometric illustration with a focus on detail and a clean, sophisticated color palette.

name: LongCat-Video
readme_summary: LongCat-Video is a 13.6B parameter foundational video generation model capable of Text-to-Video, Image-to-Video, and Video-Continuation tasks. It is particularly optimized for efficient, high-quality generation of long videos, aiming to be a step towards world models.
key_features: Unified architecture for Text-to-Video, Image-to-Video, and Video-Continuation
Natively pretrained for long video generation (minutes-long) without quality degradation
Efficient inference for 720p, 30fps videos using coarse-to-fine strategy and Block Sparse Attention
Strong performance achieved through multi-reward RLHF (GRPO)
primary_use_case: Generating high-quality, long videos from text, images, or by continuing existing video content.
cover_image_prompt: A master weaver at a loom, skillfully weaving a long, continuous tapestry that depicts a vibrant, evolving scene. The threads are streams of data, with some threads originating from text prompts and others from still images. The tapestry itself is a high-definition video playing out in real-time, showcasing smooth temporal progression and rich detail. Subtle digital particles and glowing UI elements around the weaver indicate the underlying AI technology. The scene is set in a bright, modern studio with a clean composition, rendered in a 3D isometric illustration style with a focus on clarity and visual storytelling. The repository name 'LongCat-Video' is subtly integrated into a small sign on the loom.

name: PDFeXpress
description: PDF eXpress,  used to handle many operations for PDF, such as merge, split, extract images and text, convert between PDF and images ...
readme_summary: PDF eXpress is a Python application designed for comprehensive PDF manipulation. It offers a wide array of functionalities including merging, splitting, rotating, extracting text and images, converting between PDF and image formats, and adding page numbers, making it a versatile tool for managing PDF documents.
primary_use_case: A desktop application for performing various operations on PDF files, such as merging, splitting, extracting content, and format conversion.
cover_image_prompt: A magical, multi-faceted Swiss Army knife is shown in the center of the frame, with each tool of the knife subtly transforming into a different PDF operation. One tool is merging several small PDF icons into a single large one, another is slicing a PDF icon into multiple pieces, and a third is extracting text or image elements from a PDF icon. The background is a clean, organized digital workspace with subtle UI elements and glowing data streams. The overall mood is efficient and powerful, with a clean, modern aesthetic. The style should be a 3D isometric illustration with clear iconography and vibrant, yet professional, colors, emphasizing the versatility and ease of use of PDF eXpress.
